title: Update user through API
excerpt: Please allow us a way through which we can update a user record through API. Currently i could not find any Mutation GraphQL query for modifying a user record. I typically want to have access to enable or disable a user …

posts.author: himank.gupta (Himank Gupta)
posts.cookedHtml: Please allow us a way through which we can update a user record through API. Currently i could not find any Mutation GraphQL query for modifying a user record. I typically want to have access to enable or disable a user through API for one of my integration use cases.
